title: The Pittsburgh Businesses Actually Showing Up On Their Own Feed
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement.
intro:
Of the hundreds of Pittsburgh small businesses tracked in this index, most have gone quiet. No posts this month, no posts last month, sometimes no posts this year. The rankings below reflect the minority that haven't, sorted by 30-day posting cadence and the engagement those posts actually generated.

What makes this quarter's list strange is how often the momentum belongs to someone else. Jeni's in Larimer crossed a million TikTok plays this quarter, none of them from Jeni's own account. Hop Farm Brewing in Lawrenceville holds the top brewery ranking on the back of 21 independent creators. Kyo Matcha has 1.8 million TikTok views and a review score that hasn't caught up. In each case, the business is benefiting from attention it did not generate and, so far, has not learned to hold.

The one clear exception is Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange in the Strip District, where 31 creators documented the experience independently and the business ranks first in Pittsburgh coffee. That convergence of organic signal and category position is what the rest of this list is working toward. Issue 02, Summer 2026, will track whether any of these businesses have started showing up for themselves.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Second In Desserts On The Strength Of 1.8 Million TikTok Plays. The Reviews Have Not Kept Pace.

featured_tiktok.author: andremelendez
featured_tiktok.caption: this matcha place deserves more hype👀 #matchalover #fluffiestmatcha #matchaspot

items.playbook_top_move: Close the review sentiment gap now. Address the two recurring operational complaints, portion consistency and closing-time enforcement, before next quarter's review cycle closes.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Coffee, Powered By Creator Momentum. The Google Listing Has No Website To Close The Loop.
items.playbook_top_move: Add a website to the Google listing. The Google profile shows no linked website; even a single-page menu site would stop visitors from bouncing at the search result.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Second In Breweries, Carried By Reviews. The Taproom Has No TikTok Footprint Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Address the kitchen critique directly. One negative review thread on overcooked food is enough to suppress a sentiment signal sitting two points below the family median; a menu edit or staff calibration on bar bites is the fastest path to closing that gap.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: Number One In Coffee, Built On Smell And Ritual. Thirty-One Creators Confirm It.

featured_tiktok.author: pittsburghpg
featured_tiktok.caption:
HBO Max's award-winning medical drama “The Pitt” does a lot of things to ground itself in Pittsburgh.
Its emergency room is based on that of Allegheny General Hospital on the North Side. There are a variety of local references, including on

items.playbook_top_move: Close the gap on your own TikTok. Post 3 short-form videos per week on @adventureallegheny showing the bean wall and cold brew taps, the two scenes creators keep filming anyway.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars On Borrowed Reach. The Bar Hasn't Claimed Its Own TikTok Story.
items.playbook_top_move: Build a TikTok presence before creators define you. Ten creators posted 425,844 plays this quarter with zero input from Hidden Harbor. Claim the account and post even two videos a month to own the narrative.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Sweets, Built On 3,145 Reviews. Fourteen Creators Are Posting; Page's Is Not.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok channel now. Fourteen creators have generated 177,416 plays this quarter with no account to tag; a verified TikTok profile captures that traffic before a competitor does.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes On Review Depth. The Camera Has Not Followed Yet.

featured_tiktok.author: latashaforpa
featured_tiktok.caption:
I might even buy you a coffee… ☕️ 

Stop by Tazza D’oro to pick-up, drop-off or sign my petition to get on the ballot in the May 19 Primary Election!

Team #Mayes2026 will be there 9A-3P Saturdays and Sundays starting today, February 21!

#

items.playbook_top_move: Turn specials into reels, not stills. Zero reels posted in the last 30 days; the Amaretto Latte and seasonal muffins are ready-made subjects that reviewers are already writing about.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: A Million TikTok Plays This Quarter, Every Single One in Someone Else's Account.

featured_tiktok.author: morganchompz
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying Jeni’s spring ice cream flavor lineup! 🍦💐 Have you tried any of these? @Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams #icecream #dessert #newfood #foodreview #snacks

items.playbook_top_move: Claim a TikTok presence before spring ends. With 37 creator videos and 1.15 million plays already logged this quarter, a verified account captures future tags and lets the brand respond to @morganchompz's million-play clip directly.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Number One In Breweries, Powered By 21 Creators. The Business Captures None Of That Signal.

featured_tiktok.author: stevenjamesyuhasz
featured_tiktok.caption: The staff and customer service here was unbelievable. Definitely the type of place I want to support. @B&K Farm Market #warren #youngstown #cortland #ohio

items.playbook_top_move: Start a TikTok account this week. Twenty-one creators generated 170,828 plays tagging Hop Farm this quarter; a business account captures future tags, replies, and discovery that currently go nowhere.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Sixteen Creators Have Filed Their Reports. Delanie's Coffee Has Not Filed Its Own.

featured_tiktok.author: stephr0se8
featured_tiktok.caption:
Some of my fave local coffee shops! Drop some more reccs for me to try 👇🏼
#localcoffeeshop #pittsburgh #coffeetok #supportsmallbusiness #fyp

items.playbook_top_move: Close the TikTok gap before it widens. Claim a TikTok account and post one video weekly; 16 outside creators have already scripted the brief for you.
